name: hatch-pet-v2-workflow
description: Production workflow for creating, repairing, validating, and packaging Codex v2 animated pets.

interface.shortDescription: Production-grade Codex v2 pets with reactions and QA
interface.longDescription: Create, repair, validate, and package native Codex v2 animated pets with 16 look directions, click-reaction presets, resumable multi-outfit workflows, targeted row repair, visual QA, and cache-safe installation.
defaultPrompt: Create two Codex v2 pet outfits from my reference photos with distinct click reactions.
Repair this Codex pet's hair edges, animation rows, directions, and package validation.
Resume this pet family run and regenerate only the failed rows.
